message:
feat(mvcc): add SSI metrics counters and tracing span for ssi_validate (bd-688.2)

Add observability layer for SSI validation: AtomicU64 metric counters
(commits, aborts by reason, validations) and a tracing span 'ssi_validate'
with txn_id, read/write set sizes, conflict_detected, and decision_reason
fields recorded at each decision point. 6 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
